name: Biscuit Cookies
description: Sweet baked snack biscuits made with wheat flour and chocolate cream. Commonly used with tea or milk and loved by all age groups.

name: Bread
description: Soft sliced bread made from refined wheat flour. Used for breakfast, sandwiches, and toast.

name: Butter
description: Creamy dairy butter made from milk fat. Used for cooking, baking, and spreading on bread.

name: Cheese
description: Processed cheese made from milk, used in sandwiches, burgers, and cooking recipes.

name: Checkpass
description: A packaged grocery item used in daily kitchen needs. Stored in sealed packing for longer shelf life.

name: Coffee
description: Instant coffee powder made from roasted coffee beans. Used to make hot and cold coffee drinks.

name: Cooking Oil
description: Refined cooking oil used for frying and daily cooking. Made from vegetable sources.

name: Eggs
description: Fresh chicken eggs rich in protein. Used for breakfast, baking, and cooking meals.

name: Ketchup
description: Tomato ketchup made from ripe tomatoes. Used as a sauce with snacks and fast food.

name: Lentils
description: Dried lentils rich in protein and fiber. Used to prepare traditional lentil dishes.

name: Milk
description: Packaged fresh milk used for drinking, tea, coffee, and cooking purposes.

name: Noodles
description: Instant noodles made from wheat flour. Easy to cook and commonly used as a quick meal.

name: Pasta
description: Dry pasta made from durum wheat. Used to prepare various Italian-style dishes.

name: Rice
description: Long grain rice used as a staple food. Suitable for daily meals and special dishes.

name: Salt
description: Edible salt used for seasoning food. Essential ingredient in everyday cooking.

name: Spice Mix
description: Ready-made spice mix containing blended spices. Used to enhance flavor in cooking.

name: Sugar
description: Refined sugar used for sweetening beverages and cooking.

name: Tea
description: Tea leaves used for making hot or cold tea drinks.

name: Wheat Flour
description: Finely ground wheat flour used for baking, cooking, and making bread or roti.

name: Yogurt
description: Fresh yogurt made from milk, used for breakfast, smoothies, or cooking.
